content.en:
The Lord of Ice Rain continued, "Among the seventeen Origin Realms of Ice Rain Island, in addition to me, there are two other Origin Middle Realms, and they are not qualified to become Island Masters, so they are still members of Ice Rain Island!"

The Lord of the Ice Rain said a lot about the situation on the Ice Rain Island.

And Ye Tian has been listening carefully.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said: "Usually, if I am not on Ice Rain Island, if you have something, you can find other island owners." You just joined Ice Rain Island, and for the time being, it's cultivation. You have now mastered the Golden Body of the Other Shore, and your will has been elevated to the Origin Realm Will, and you have also comprehended the Origin Rules of the Other Shore. Therefore, I will not guide you in the cultivation of the Bone Transformation Realm. The content of your cultivation now is to master more of the Golden Script and the Haven of the Other Shore. "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

And he retired.

Then, he chose a mountain peak as his place to live on Icy Rain Island and opened a dojo here.

It didn't take long for the dojo to be opened!

Next, he was ready to comprehend the Golden Text on the Other Side and the Haven on the Other Side.

Rain Island.

The Tower of the Other Side.

There are a lot of golden inscriptions and black inscriptions on the other side preserved here, so that every genius at the other side can comprehend the golden inscriptions of the other side here for free.

When Ye Tian came here, he saw a dense network of golden texts on the other side and black text on the other side.

"That's ...... amount"

Ye Tian was really shocked.

Compared with the golden inscriptions on the other side and the black inscriptions on the other side of Fengya Island, the number of golden inscriptions on the other side and the black inscriptions on the other side preserved in Guheng Mountain is too small to be worth mentioning at all.

Other than that.

Wind Tooth Island also gives a lot of resources to help with cultivation.

For example, the Enlightenment Fruit of the Other Shore, this resource comes from the Enlightenment Tree of the Other Shore, which is very rare in the east.

At the beginning of the auction, the seeds of the Enlightenment Tree on the other side were auctioned off by a top force, and cultivating the Enlightenment Tree on the other side requires many years of cultivation before you can obtain the Enlightenment Fruits of the other side in the long years.

But on Fengya Island, he directly obtained a hundred Enlightenment Fruits from the other side.

This is one of the rewards given to him by the Lord of Ice Rain for joining Ice Rain Island.

"With the enlightenment fruit on the other side, coupled with my own understanding, I should be able to quickly comprehend the golden text and the black text on the other side!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the years that followed, he took one by one the Enlightenment Fruits of the Other Shore to quickly comprehend the Golden Texts and the Upper Havens one by one.

Gradually, he mastered more and more of the Golden Script and the Haven of the Other Side.

When he was comprehending the Golden Script on the Other Side and the Black Text on the Other Side, he was also using the Source Stone of the Other Shore to refine his Golden Bone on the Other Side.

Fengya Island had a lot of source stones on the other side, which was enough for him to raise his cultivation to the ninth bone transformation realm.

In addition to him, other other shore-level geniuses were also cultivating in retreat after entering Wind Tooth Island.

Of course.

The content of their cultivation was different from Ye Tian's, some of the other side level geniuses were cultivating methods similar to the golden body of Xuanyang and some were comprehending the origin rules of the other side.

But.

It is impossible for Fengya Island to provide resources indefinitely, and once the resources are exhausted, you will have to work your own.

It's like the finest eternal gold, which can't be provided infinitely, only some.

Like Ye Tian, there are a lot of resources, but they can't withstand continuous consumption!

Time flies.

After the Five Thousand Archean Era.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation had finally reached the extreme of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm.

Immediately after, he used the supernatural power of the other side that he had created a long time ago to merge into his body, trying to break through, but failed.

And then.

He continued to create a top-notch supernatural ability on the other side, and once again slammed into the Nine Bone Transformation Realm.

This time, he successfully broke through the bottleneck, and quenched the last bit of the golden bone on the other side to complete the nine bone transformations, breaking through to the nine bone transformation realms.

"Finally broke through to the Nine Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With his current strength, he could easily kill the other nine Bone Transformation Realm Peer-level geniuses, and his strength was no less than that of an ordinary Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Of course, compared to the other side of the Origin Realm, he naturally didn't see enough.

Therefore, any one in the Origin Realm of Wind Tooth Island could easily beat him or even kill him in seconds!

He is not qualified to be proud yet!

In addition to his breakthrough in cultivation, his attainments in comprehending the golden text on the other side and the black text on the other side are also very high.

Now.

The number of golden scripts on the other side of his grasp reached 67,000, and the number of black scripts on the other side reached more than 69,000.

Compared with the past, the number of his Golden Texts and Giant Texts has skyrocketed!

This is all the enlightenment fruit of the other side plus other resources, plus your own understanding and the unlimited number of golden texts on the other side, so that you have such attainments.

And in the east, there are no such favorable conditions!

"More than 60,000 gold and black scripts on the other side are still not enough. You need to master 109,600 Golden Scripts and 109,600 Upper Scripts before you can hope to create the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, his current attainments are nothing at all.

"Let's go to the Inheritance Tower, there are a lot of inheritances on Wind Tooth Island, maybe it will help me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He came to the Tower of Inheritance.

There are many kinds of inheritances, such as the formation inheritance, the golden body inheritance on the other side, and the supreme art inheritance on the other side.

Among them, the inheritance of the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore can only be used for reference, and some weakened versions of the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore have no power at all, so they can only be used for reference.

Ye Tian took a look at these inheritances, and some of them only looked at the introduction slightly, and they were not interested in learning.

Soon.

He came to the formation inheritance area.

"Wind Tooth Island should have the inheritance of the Origin Circle!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He was going to find a magic circle inheritance that was better than the Tailing Origin Circle.

And Wind Tooth Island definitely has it.

Really.

After looking around, he managed to find it, and there was more than one.

The Tailing Origin Circle required three thousand six hundred pieces of high-grade eternal gold, which could last for five hundred primeval epochs.

In the inheritance of the Origin Array of Fengya Island, there are hundreds of Origin Arrays that can maintain the time of the Five Hundred Ancient Eras, among which the most cost-effective one of the same grades as the Tailing Origin Array is an Origin Array, which only needs three thousand pieces of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold to maintain the Five Hundred Ancient Eras, which is better than the Tailing Origin Array.

Of course.

This grade of Origin Array, Ye Tian can't look down on it now.

He quickly took a fancy to an Origin Law - the Void Origin Array!

This Origin Circle required 13,000 pieces of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold and various precious materials, which could last for 5,000 primeval eras.

This is much more cost-effective than the Tailing Origin Array!

It's just that for other other Shore-level geniuses, it would be more difficult to scrape together thirteen thousand pieces of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold!
